title: 1024 Extended
description: This datapack increaces the world height to 1024
body:
# Description
This mod / datapack increaces the build limit of your world in all dimensions so you can build bigger bases and farms. 

## Features
- Extended Overworld
- Extended Nether
- Extended End 
- Extended Amplified worlds

## How to report bugs

Please visit my [discord](https://discord.com/invite/9CnGMD9JuM) and report bugs there
